content.thinking: I'm noticing a key contradiction in the narrative: the Guard claims the Warden died three nights ago, but the Elder insists the Warden is alive and well. There's also an issue where the Guard seems to be revealing information prematurely—suggesting the Elders know about the Warden's death but haven't announced it yet. Meanwhile, Commander Vale's leadership of the garrison appears consistent and doesn't present the same kind of contradiction.
